name: caesar_cipher
cpp_unit: std::string caesar_cipher(std::string s, int shift){ std::string result=""; int sh=((shift%26)+26)%26; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ int c=(unsigned char)s[i]; if(c>=65&&c<=90) c=(c-65+sh)%26+65; else if(c>=97&&c<=122) c=(c-97+sh)%26+97; result+=(char)c; } return result; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%s
", caesar_cipher("Hello, World", 5).c_str()); printf("%s
", caesar_cipher("xyzABC", 4).c_str()); printf("%s
", caesar_cipher("Mojo", -1).c_str()); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(caesar_cipher("Hello, World", 5))
    print(caesar_cipher("xyzABC", 4))
    print(caesar_cipher("Mojo", -1))

name: rot13
cpp_unit: std::string rot13(std::string s){ std::string result=""; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ int c=(unsigned char)s[i]; if(c>=65&&c<=90) c=(c-65+13)%26+65; else if(c>=97&&c<=122) c=(c-97+13)%26+97; result+=(char)c; } return result; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%s\n", rot13("Hello").c_str()); printf("%s\n", rot13("Uryyb").c_str()); return 0; }

name: is_anagram
cpp_unit: int is_anagram(std::string a, std::string b){ int ca[26]; for(int i=0;i<26;i++) ca[i]=0; for(int i=0;i<(int)a.size();i++){ int c=(unsigned char)a[i]; if(c>=65&&c<=90) c+=32; if(c>=97&&c<=122) ca[c-97]++; } for(int i=0;i<(int)b.size();i++){ int c=(unsigned char)b[i]; if(c>=65&&c<=90) c+=32; if(c>=97&&c<=122) ca[c-97]--; } for(int i=0;i<26;i++) if(ca[i]!=0) return 0; return 1; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", is_anagram("Listen", "Silent")); printf("%d
", is_anagram("hello", "world")); printf("%d
", is_anagram("abc", "cab")); return 0; }

name: count_digits
cpp_unit: int count_digits(std::string s){ int count=0; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ int c=(unsigned char)s[i]; if(c>=48&&c<=57) count++; } return count; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%d\n", count_digits("abc123def45")); printf("%d\n", count_digits("no digits here")); return 0; }

name: sum_of_digits_in_string
cpp_unit: int sum_of_digits_in_string(std::string s){ int total=0; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ int c=(unsigned char)s[i]; if(c>=48&&c<=57) total+=(c-48); } return total; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%d\n", sum_of_digits_in_string("a1b2c3")); printf("%d\n", sum_of_digits_in_string("year 2024")); return 0; }

name: longest_run_char
cpp_unit: int longest_run_char(std::string s){ int n=(int)s.size(); if(n==0) return 0; int best=1, cur=1; for(int i=1;i<n;i++){ if(s[i]==s[i-1]){ cur++; if(cur>best) best=cur; } else cur=1; } return best; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", longest_run_char("aabbbcc")); printf("%d
", longest_run_char("abcde")); printf("%d
", longest_run_char("wwwww")); return 0; }

name: capitalize_words
cpp_unit: std::string capitalize_words(std::string s){ std::string result=""; int start=1; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ int c=(unsigned char)s[i]; if(c==32){ start=1; result+=(char)c; } else { if(start && c>=97&&c<=122) c-=32; start=0; result+=(char)c; } } return result; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%s\n", capitalize_words("hello world foo").c_str()); printf("%s\n", capitalize_words("a b c").c_str()); return 0; }

name: strip_spaces
cpp_unit: std::string strip_spaces(std::string s){ int n=(int)s.size(); int i=0; int j=n-1; while(i<n && s[i]==32) i++; while(j>=i && s[j]==32) j--; std::string result=""; for(int k=i;k<=j;k++) result+=s[k]; return result; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("[%s]
", strip_spaces("   hello   ").c_str()); printf("[%s]
", strip_spaces("no pad").c_str()); printf("[%s]
", strip_spaces("     ").c_str()); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print("[" + strip_spaces("   hello   ") + "]")
    print("[" + strip_spaces("no pad") + "]")
    print("[" + strip_spaces("     ") + "]")

name: replace_char
cpp_unit: std::string replace_char(std::string s, char from, char to){ std::string result=""; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ char c=s[i]; if(c==from) c=to; result+=c; } return result; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%s\n", replace_char("banana", 'a', 'o').c_str()); printf("%s\n", replace_char("hello", 'l', 'L').c_str()); return 0; }

name: is_numeric
cpp_unit: int is_numeric(std::string s){ int n=(int)s.size(); if(n==0) return 0; for(int i=0;i<n;i++){ int c=(unsigned char)s[i]; if(c<48||c>57) return 0; } return 1; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", is_numeric("12345")); printf("%d
", is_numeric("12a45")); printf("%d
", is_numeric("")); return 0; }

name: hamming_str
cpp_unit: int hamming_str(std::string a, std::string b){ int n=(int)a.size(); int count=0; for(int i=0;i<n;i++){ if(a[i]!=b[i]) count++; } return count; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", hamming_str("karolin", "kathrin")); printf("%d
", hamming_str("abcde", "abcde")); printf("%d
", hamming_str("1011101", "1001001")); return 0; }

name: count_uppercase
cpp_unit: int count_uppercase(std::string s){ int count=0; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ int c=(unsigned char)s[i]; if(c>=65&&c<=90) count++; } return count; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", count_uppercase("Hello World")); printf("%d
", count_uppercase("ALLCAPS")); printf("%d
", count_uppercase("none")); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(count_uppercase("Hello World"))
    print(count_uppercase("ALLCAPS"))
    print(count_uppercase("none"))

name: first_unique_char_index
cpp_unit: int first_unique_char_index(std::string s){ int freq[256]; for(int i=0;i<256;i++) freq[i]=0; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++) freq[(unsigned char)s[i]]++; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ if(freq[(unsigned char)s[i]]==1) return i; } return -1; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", first_unique_char_index("leetcode")); printf("%d
", first_unique_char_index("aabb")); printf("%d
", first_unique_char_index("abca")); return 0; }

name: repeat_string
cpp_unit: std::string repeat_string(std::string s, int n){ std::string result=""; for(int i=0;i<n;i++) result+=s; return result; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%s
", repeat_string("ab", 3).c_str()); printf("%s
", repeat_string("x", 5).c_str()); printf("[%s]
", repeat_string("z", 0).c_str()); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(repeat_string("ab", 3))
    print(repeat_string("x", 5))
    print("[" + repeat_string("z", 0) + "]")

name: swap_case
cpp_unit: std::string swap_case(std::string s){ std::string result=""; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ int c=(unsigned char)s[i]; if(c>=65&&c<=90) c+=32; else if(c>=97&&c<=122) c-=32; result+=(char)c; } return result; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%s\n", swap_case("Hello World").c_str()); printf("%s\n", swap_case("aBcDeF").c_str()); return 0; }

name: remove_vowels
cpp_unit: std::string remove_vowels(std::string s){ std::string result=""; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ int c=(unsigned char)s[i]; int l=c; if(l>=65&&l<=90) l+=32; if(l==97||l==101||l==105||l==111||l==117) continue; result+=(char)c; } return result; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%s\n", remove_vowels("Hello World").c_str()); printf("%s\n", remove_vowels("AEIOUaeiou").c_str()); return 0; }

name: is_subsequence
cpp_unit: int is_subsequence(std::string a, std::string b){ int i=0; int n=(int)a.size(); int m=(int)b.size(); for(int j=0;j<m && i<n;j++){ if(a[i]==b[j]) i++; } return i==n?1:0; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", is_subsequence("abc", "ahbgdc")); printf("%d
", is_subsequence("axc", "ahbgdc")); printf("%d
", is_subsequence("", "xyz")); return 0; }

name: count_substring_overlap
cpp_unit: int count_substring_overlap(std::string s, std::string sub){ int n=(int)s.size(); int m=(int)sub.size(); if(m==0) return 0; int count=0; for(int i=0;i+m<=n;i++){ int ok=1; for(int k=0;k<m;k++){ if(s[i+k]!=sub[k]){ ok=0; break; } } if(ok) count++; } return count; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", count_substring_overlap("aaaa", "aa")); printf("%d
", count_substring_overlap("abababa", "aba")); printf("%d
", count_substring_overlap("abc", "xy")); return 0; }

name: levenshtein
cpp_unit: int levenshtein(std::string a, std::string b){ int n=(int)a.size(); int m=(int)b.size(); std::vector<int> prev(m+1), cur(m+1); for(int j=0;j<=m;j++) prev[j]=j; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){ cur[0]=i; for(int j=1;j<=m;j++){ int cost=(a[i-1]==b[j-1])?0:1; int d=prev[j]+1; int ins=cur[j-1]+1; int sub=prev[j-1]+cost; int mn=d; if(ins<mn) mn=ins; if(sub<mn) mn=sub; cur[j]=mn; } for(int j=0;j<=m;j++) prev[j]=cur[j]; } return prev[m]; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", levenshtein("kitten", "sitting")); printf("%d
", levenshtein("flaw", "lawn")); printf("%d
", levenshtein("abc", "abc")); return 0; }
